data.title: Rokmaster updates on Selkirk Project & silver targets. 100% owned project & other potentials discussed. TSXV: RKR.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 12, 2025, Rokmaster Resources Corp. released an update on its Selkirk Project, which is fully owned by the company. Rokmaster, trading under TSXV: RKR, OTCQB: RKMSF, and FSE: 1RR1, shared details on the silver prospects regarding this project and other ventures in their portfolio.

data.title: Tech Mahindra Global Chess League partners with AWS for smart broadcasting solutions. Season 3 in Mumbai, Dec 2025.
data.description: In December 2025, the Global Chess League (GCL), created through a partnership between Tech Mahindra and FIDE, will enhance its smart broadcasting experience in Mumbai for Season 3. This collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS) based in Pune, India, is set to elevate GCL's capabilities using the cloud.

data.title: Inbolt unveils groundbreaking bin picking solution for robots, enabling human-like adaptability.
data.description: A company based in Detroit, Inbolt, has unveiled its latest bin picking solution for industrial robots. This innovative technology aims to introduce human-like adaptability to robotics by allowing robots to efficiently identify, grasp, and place parts in fully unstructured settings. The system is designed to operate effectively even when objects are randomly arranged or partially obscured. This advancement sets a new benchmark in industrial bin picking capabilities, offering unparalleled flexibility and precision.

data.title: Formula 1 Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix in 2025 attracts record-breaking 339,000 fans to Yas Island.
data.description: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on December 12, 2025, Ethara, the organizers of the Formula 1 Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, revealed that the race week in 2025 set a new attendance record, attracting a remarkable total of 339,000 fans to various events. The season finale of the 2025 Formula 1 season saw a three-way title challenge unfold.

data.title: New Yorkers share wild SantaCon tales: bar crawl charity event sparks mixed feelings for over 25 years. #NYC #SantaCon
data.description: For over 25 years, a popular bar crawl and charity fund-raiser in the city has been generating significant attention and feedback from the community. Numerous readers have shared their thoughts on this long-standing event, highlighting its impact and significance in the city.

data.title: Nel ASA finalizes investment decision to industrialize Next-Generation Pressurized Alkaline platform after a successful seven-year development program, securing industry leadership.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on December 12, 2025, Nel ASA (Nel) (OSE: NEL) shared news of a significant milestone. After a seven-year development program, the company has achieved successful production of clean hydrogen on the Next Generation Pressurized Alkaline prototype. This achievement marks a crucial step forward in Nel's hydrogen endeavors. The Board of Directors expressed satisfaction with the progress made, highlighting the culmination of this long-term effort. This accomplishment underscores Nel's commitment to advancing hydrogen technology and sustainability.

data.title: Ilham Smaali appointed Chief Supply Chain Officer at Essity, starting on Dec 31, 2025. Newly established role.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Essity, a leading hygiene and health company based in Stockholm, announced the appointment of Ilham Smaali as Chief Supply Chain Officer. Smaali is set to assume her new role on December 31, 2025, and will become a part of Essity's Executive Management Team. This move comes as Supply Chain Enablement, a newly formed division within Essity, aims to revamp and streamline operations. Smaali's appointment signifies a strategic shift in the company's supply chain management approach, reflecting Essity's commitment to operational excellence and efficiency.

data.title: Multimodal transport market set to reach $159.30 billion by 2032 with a CAGR of 7.1%, up from $98.61 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 12, 2025, analysts at MarketsandMarkets™ disclosed that the multimodal transport sector is anticipated to expand significantly from USD 98.61 billion in 2025 to USD 159.30 billion in 2032, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.1%. The report consists of an extensive analysis disseminated across 250 market data Tables, 80 Figures, and a comprehensive 350 Pages.

data.title: Axel Springer selects Navan for global travel management, employees to access platform, Expense & Payment systems.
data.description: In Berlin, Navan (NASDAQ: NAVN) revealed that Axel Springer, a transatlantic family-owned media company, has selected Navan as its latest global travel management solution. With this partnership, employees of Axel Springer can utilize Navan's travel management platform, while specific business units within the company will also leverage Navan's Expense and Payment systems. Navan, renowned for its all-in-one AI-driven capabilities, serves as a comprehensive platform for worldwide travel needs.

data.title: Valmet secures EUR 375 million Schuldschein loan, enhancing financial position and debt structure.
data.description: Valmet Oyj announced on December 12, 2025, that it has completed its inaugural Schuldschein loan transaction valued at EUR 375 million. This milestone issuance enhances Valmet's overall debt framework, providing long-term benefits to the company.
